metadata.description:
Embark on the journey to crack your dream exam! 

Unacademy, India’s largest learning platform aims to change the way India learns, one Live Class at a time. Unacademy has helped Learners crack their dream exam by getting India’s Top Educators on a single platform.

Millions have cracked it with Unacademy and you can be next! Prepare for JEE, NEET UG, CAT, SSC Exams, State PSCs, other competitive exams and CBSE Class 6 - 12 with India’s Top Educators. The Unacademy App is a complete solution for

reviews.title: Bug in the app
reviews.body: While using this App on mobile, to go  back  from one page to another the respective back button, on top left corner, gets merge with the mobile’s top control panel and hence we need to close the app just to go back.
reviews.author: Addy Sood

reviews.title: Worst app for any Edtech Platform
reviews.body:
I have asked and even emailed them about the issues that are happening across both their app and web but there has been no acknowledgement and if there is they make you make video of proofs and even if you send them those they say they cant see those. Just way of deterring any responsibility. 

Okay for this app, kindly update it for iOS26. While watching the video the screen locks automatically. Even basic video apps prevent screen from locking. Also the back button merges with the time on left side making it hard to press. Does not happen until the Control Centre has been opened. Guys you have charged a fees for online classes. Goddam fix your apps atleast. This is minimum of any Edtech Provider.
reviews.author: Rishabh The Great

reviews.title: System
reviews.body:
bad interface 
buttons overlapping ios system 
which makes them u clickable.
reviews.author: KushallD

reviews.title: Good contents, fix app issues
reviews.body:
* Back button on top left doesn’t work on iPhone 17 pm, latest ios.
* Tests tab doesn’t open on iPad 9 latest iPadOS 

Otherwise app content is good.
reviews.author: Sajalb

reviews.title: Fraud platform
reviews.body:
​I am beyond frustrated. I paid ₹49,999 for the IIT JEE batch three days ago, and since then, I have been completely ghosted. Despite the heavy price tag, the batch shows zero enrollments, and no classes have started. It feels like I've just handed over my hard-earned money to a crook platform.
​I have sent multiple emails to their support team, but there has been no action, no reply, and no accountability. For an "educational" platform, their lack of professionalism is shocking. They are quick to take your money but non-existent when it comes to providing the service or support they promised.
​Unacademy is a complete fraud
reviews.author: Aanvi Maheshwari

reviews.title: Back button not working
reviews.body: This is really so much negligence

reviews.title: Live class Notifications does not come like in Android.
reviews.body: Live class Notifications does not come like in Android.
reviews.author: Rachit Saroha

reviews.title: No longer works on IOS
reviews.body: The latest update has effectively broken the app for iOS users. The app opens and appears normal, but whenever I try to join a live class it repeatedly shows “no stable network connection,” even though my Wi-Fi is perfectly fine. Because of this bug, I’m completely unable to attend my classes. The working update seems to be available only on Android, and I don’t have an Android device, so I’m essentially locked out of the platform I depend on for my studies. This is extremely frustrating and needs to be fixed urgently.

reviews.title: Not for ICSE syllabus at all
reviews.body: I was made false promises that iconic foundation batch will cover 90% of 9th ICSE syllabus but when  compared with academic text books only 50% of the maths chapters were covered. Do not fall for the trap . The support provided by Unacademy is zero. Once you take the subscription then no support is available . The mentor support is only to check the class quality and clear some doubts. Once you identify that you are fooled then there is no one to help

reviews.author: Rev01>

reviews.title: fraud and scam
reviews.body:
I contacted customer care 2–3 times and asked whether Moin Sir’s history lectures are available in the Vijeta Batch 2025–2026. Every time, they said yes and told me that Moin Sir’s recorded batch is available and that I would be able to watch the lectures after taking the subscription by going to the batch section.

But after purchasing the subscription, there are no history lectures by Moin Sir available in the batch. I don’t know who this teacher is, but Ajay Dhyal’s lectures are available, and I do not want to study from him.

I feel that I have been scammed and that fake promises were made to me. 
👎🏻👎🏻

reviews.title: My experience with PCMC centre
reviews.body:
I am an NEET Aspirant from Unacdemy learning since a year.
The academy is a great place to learn. The teachers are helpful, the lessons are clear, Everything is well-organized. It’s a reliable and friendly place to build new skills.
We are offered with useful resources, extra activities, and regular updates to keep parents and students informed. The environment is positive and encouraging, helping students build confidence while improving their skills. It’s a dependable place where learning truly feels enjoyable
The facilities are excellent—classrooms are clean, spacious, and well-equipped with modern tools that make learning easier. The library and study areas are quiet and comfortable, giving students a good space to focus.

Just a money making machine. Beware! N trust me, i’m gonna sue you people! Mark my words!

reviews.title: Strong Lectures, Lacking in Follow-up and Career Alignment
reviews.body:
I recently subscribed to this learning platform in Post Graduate Program in Mechanical Engineering and have gone through several of their online saved lectures. The content quality is quite good—well-structured and easy to follow. The flexibility of accessing saved lectures at any time is definitely a plus.

However, I noticed a few areas that need improvement. Firstly, there's no active monitoring or follow-up if a learner misses lectures for a period of time, such as a week. Some level of engagement or reminders could help maintain consistency and motivation.

Secondly, while the platform does offer interview opportunities, I found that the CTC (Cost to Company) for many of these opportunities was actually lower than my current compensation.

reviews.title: Horrible
reviews.body: Unacademy is disappointing and harmful for UPSC aspirants. The content is inconsistent and poorly structured, with many courses taught by inexperienced educators. The platform seems more focused on profit, pushing constant course purchases, causing financial strain and anxiety. This adds significant stress to students' already challenging preparation, negatively impacting their mental health. Unacademy needs to improve its approach to truly support aspirants' success. I cannot recommend it.

reviews.body:
I bought a Mbbs prof 1 subscription of one year !! And within few days after , I came to realise that they are taking classes randomly . Especially, anatomy sir , Ankit !! And worst thing is that they don’t even provide notes  .

And plus , their customer service is worst ! Before purchasing there will lots of sweet talk but after purchasing, u will not get a single proper response whenever u have problems. 

So ! My suggestion is Go for other alternatives available, read the reviews and go for it . 

Trust me , UNACADEMY IS GOING TO BE THE 2nd BYJUS . Get ready with your popcorn to watch the downfall of unacademy soon !
reviews.author: Denit Ningthoujam

reviews.title: The worst user interface
reviews.body: Hi, I’ve been an user of unacademy since last 2 years maybe, and the free platform has classes all over it, it’s unorganised and messy, can’t find classes in sequence, will have to go through multiple steps to see the classes in apps, very time consuming and tedious and absolutely not worth it, some classes are deleted, and the succeeding ones are missing. YouTube classes are way more organised. Please look into this issue. Thank you.

reviews.author: Deepaknaamhai

reviews.title: Extremely Disappointing Experience with Unacademy
reviews.body: My experience with Unacademy for a 3-month GMAT course was extremely disappointing. Despite promises of regular live classes, most were cancelled, and I only received a 5-6 classes in December and January. When I reached out for help, I received unhelpful responses and was offered only a partial refund. Additionally, I learned that the GMAT team at Unacademy has been removed, indicating a lack of organization. Overall, I cannot recommend Unacademy due to their poor service and lack of accountability.
